query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content_fingerprint IS NOT NULL AND content_fingerprint != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_fingerprint,
  SUM(CASE WHEN creative_id IS NOT NULL AND creative_id != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_creative_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content_fingerprint IS NULL OR content_fingerprint = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_fingerprint
FROM ad_performance;

  SUM(CASE WHEN content_fingerprint IS NULL OR content_fingerprint = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_fingerprint
